name: InertialAR: Autoregressive 3D Molecule Generation with Inertial Frames

description: arXiv:2510.27497v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Transformer-based autoregressive models have emerged as a unifying paradigm across modalities such as text and images, but their extension to 3D molecule generation remains underexplored. The gap stems from two fundamental challenges: (1) how to tokenize molecules into a canonical 1D sequence of tokens that is invariant to both SE(3) tra...
author: Haorui Li, Weitao Du, Yuqiang Li, Hongyu Guo, Shengchao Liu
